case_title: VENITHA GOPI VS. TOWER CAR WASH

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JORGE VILLATORO, MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT TOWER CAR WASH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOPI, VENITHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOWER CAR WASH DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. SEE ATTACHMENT ONE (MC-025). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF VENITHA GOPI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TOWER CAR WASH IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JORGE VILLATORO, MANAGER. DEFENDANT CAR WASH WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GOPI, VENITHA AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER CAR WASH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
